---
title: "Hi,"
# format: 
#   html: 
#     css: ["_styles/hide_comments.css", "_styles/quote.css"]
comments: false
repo-actions: []
format:
  html:
    css: ["_styles/hide_edit.css"]
aliases: 
  - "./index.html"
---

I am Chengkun. I recently defended my [PhD thesis](https://helda.helsinki.fi/items/428f3579-5f1f-45a6-8cde-482a2147d7c5) at the University of Helsinki, where I was supervised by [Luigi Acerbi](https://lacerbi.github.io/). My research lies at the intersection of machine learning and Bayesian computation, with a focus on improving computational efficiency in challenging posterior inference settings. Prior to this, I worked in computer vision and robotics during my master's and undergraduate studies. *I am currently open to new job opportunities. If you're interested in discussing potential collaboration, feel free to reach out! (email: [sjtulck@gmail.com](mailto:sjtulck@gmail.com))*



<!-- # About the site

This website is a personal initiative to encourage writing, both as a tool for memory retention and to deepen my understanding of reality. As Richard Feynman famously remarked:

> What I cannot create, I do not understand.  -->

# Resume

```{=html}
<div style="width: 100%; height: 1000px;">
  <iframe src="cv/resume_Chengkun_Li.pdf" 
          style="width: 100%; height: 100%; border: none;" 
          title="CV of Chengkun Li">
  </iframe>
</div>
```
